titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting’.
en.hubeali.text: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Dawud ibn al-Huseen from abu al-‘Abbas who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast ’I‘tikaf is not valid.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Dawud ibn al-Huseen from abu al-‘Abbas who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast ’I‘tikaf is not valid.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ الْحُصَيْنِ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said, ‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Safwan ibn Yahya from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast ’I‘tikaf is not valid.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Safwan ibn Yahya from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast ’I‘tikaf is not valid.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ رَزِينٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
titles.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

segments: لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ .
arabic.text: لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting in the general Masjid’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting in the general Masjid’.

segments: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast and Jami‘ (central) Masjid Ttikaf is not valid.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast and Jami‘ (central) Masjid Ttikaf is not valid.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/427)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/427)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
